title: ISO 27001 Annex A Control Self-Assessment
description: CMMI-style maturity self-assessment of selected Annex A controls.

items.comment: Threat intelligence is currently ad hoc.
EDR deployed fleet-wide with central management.

title: Vendor Security Questionnaire — Payroll SaaS
description: Security due-diligence questionnaire for the payroll provider.

items.question: Do you hold a current ISO 27001 or SOC 2 report?
Is customer data encrypted at rest and in transit?
Do you support SSO / SAML federation?
Is there a documented incident response and breach-notification process?
Are subprocessors disclosed and contractually bound (DPAs)?
